definition: The credit-equity basis calculated via the Merton structural model shows Merton-implied IG spreads of ~140-180bp versus actual IG OAS of ~90-110bp, the widest gap since 2007. Historically 5/7 episodes of this gap resolved via credit widening.
evidence: 50-70bp gap between model-implied and actual IG spreads
5/7 historical resolution via credit widening rather than equity correction
open_questions: Could this persist longer due to structural changes in credit markets?
What triggers credit convergence to equity-implied levels?
